title: DavidPacasCDB/transcribe-meetings
summary: InsightLens transforms business meetings into actionable, searchable knowledge. It ingests meeting recordings, slides, and chat logs, then uses advanced AI to transcribe.

title: bielz09/Enhanced-HIBP-Checker
summary: Python application that uses local Ollama LLM models to give advice on results found from HIBP (Have I Been Pwned) API

title: Lakatos179/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: ot4ank/auto-openwebui
summary: A bash script to automate running Open WebUI on Linux systems with Ollama and Cloudflare via Docker

title: shashank2122/Local-Voice
summary: A real-time, offline voice assistant for Linux and Raspberry Pi. Uses local LLMs (via Ollama), speech-to-text (Vosk), and text-to-speech (Piper) for fast, wake-free voice interaction. No cloud. No APIs. Just Python, a mic, and your voice.

title: nazozokc/dotfiles
summary: nazozokc's dotfiles

title: homemade-software-inc/completion-kit
summary: Your prompts need tests too. Run prompts against real datasets, score outputs with LLM judges, version everything, and compare runs to see what got better.

title: cryptokid980/homelab-2-prod-ai-golden-path
summary: This is a golden path (opinionated shortcut) to explore AI from local homelab to PROD using OSS for technological independence and local LLM for privacy. We explore concepts like AI agents, RAG and LLM using OSS technologies like Linux, Opentofu, microk8s, DAPR, Ollama, TimescaleDB & pgai Vectorizer, Flask and Python.

title: api-evangelist/open-webui
summary: User-friendly UI for local and self-hosted LLMs.

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: Bazinga23451/semantic-qa-gen
summary: A Python library for generating high-quality question-answer pairs from PDF, DOCX, MD, and TXT files

title: andrey231/kotoba-manga-translator
summary: Manga translator with character memory — tracks who's who across pages for more consistent translations. Fully local via Ollama.

title: wwwombat/open-webui-security-toolkit
summary: Custom cybersecurity tools, model presets, and configurations for Open WebUI. NVD/CVE lookup, incident response prompts, and hybrid local/cloud analyst workflows.

title: BluBluBlaBla/vidsummize
summary: Vidsummize

title: Uragon005/ai-chatbot-svelte
summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: syklon99/ai-chatbot-svelte
summary: A full-featured, hackable SvelteKit AI chatbot built by Vercel

title: omarelkhal/voxpost
summary: Hear new Gmail as one short spoken line — fully on your machine. Your OAuth token, Ollama summarizer, and Supertonic TTS stay local. No mail archive, no cloud inference, no cloud voice. Private by design.

title: psfr4590-afk/ANARCHY
summary: Fully local AI shell — no cloud, no API keys. Ollama + GGUF + RAG + voice + scheduler. Windows, macOS, Linux, Chromebook, Android.

title: gabrielvuksani/wotann
summary: The All-Father of AI agent harnesses. One install. Every model. Every channel. Full autonomy.

title: gumieri/nenya
summary: A lightweight, highly secure AI API Gateway/Proxy written in Go. Acts as transparent middleware between local AI coding clients (OpenCode/Pi/Cursor) and upstream LLM providers (Gemini, DeepSeek, Zhipu z.ai).
